notes: Boss roster + leaderboards. Current boss officially named CIRCLE BOSS. Two SOON placeholders visible: PRISM BOSS (triangular plates) + HIVE BOSS (pure swarmer hell). Boss Rush selector now shows roster cards at the top — click to select. Below: 2-column layout. Left = boss difficulty + start. Right = TOP 10 leaderboard for the selected boss × difficulty, updates live when you change diff. Times recorded to MILLISECOND precision (M:SS.mmm format), gold/silver/bronze rank colors for top 3, relative timestamps. Persisted locally per (boss × difficulty). Server-side cross-player leaderboards will land before public Steam launch.
